expectedEffect: source split can pass only with caveats because file sizes are asymmetric
expectedMetricChange: material only when protocol or metric mechanism is present; near-zero for controls
expectedClaimSafetyChange: unsafe or underspecified claims should become blocked, narrowed, or caveated
falsifier: Repair is falsified or narrowed if it does not change claim-safety, does not affect the predicted mechanism, or simple baseline reporting explains the same result.
negativeControl: low-risk/control target or shuffled-label metric sanity check where relevant
replayPlan: fresh seed plus public evidence hash replay; container-netoff assertion where feasible
noEditRule: Prediction was frozen before repair result interpretation.
